name: Gunz & Golf
short_description: Gunz & Golf is a single-player, physics-based platformer. Master the three unique guns to blast the ball through an unorthodox golf course, accompanied by the omnipresent Developer and the Narrator. Prepare for hilarious frustration and satisfying shots!
detailed_description:
In Gunz & Golf, a single-player, physics-based game. Your objective is to blast your golf ball to the very top of a handcrafted pixel art course using guns!
The omnipresent Developer and the Narrator are there to accompany you to your journey


Strategize your way to the top! Choose from 3 unique guns, each with their own strategic mechanics, to overcome obstacles. The meticulously designed courses offer both satisfying challenges and hilarious frustration.


  • 3 Unique Guns: Master the 3 high-powered weapons, each offering strategic control over the shots.
  • Physics-Based Ascent: Expect satisfying challenges and plenty of comedic moments of rage-quits (we've all been there).
  • Stunning Pixel Art: Traverse a beautiful, handcrafted pixel art course.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Russian, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
